hero.headline: Island Hands, LLC
hero.subheadline: Professional Facility & Service Partner on Bainbridge Island

home.services_subtitle: We provide a wide range of professional services for both commercial facilities and residential homes in Kitsap County.
home.equipment_desc: We use commercial-grade equipment and industry-leading techniques to ensure your facility or home is cleaned to the highest standards. Our team is trained in safety and efficiency.
home.cta_subtitle: Contact Island Hands, LLC today for a free estimate on your commercial or residential project.

steps.step1_desc: Fill out our online form or give us a call to tell us about your project.
steps.step2_desc: We review your needs and provide a professional, transparent estimate.
steps.step3_desc: Our experienced team arrives on schedule and delivers high-quality service.

services.title: Our Professional Services
services.subtitle: From municipal facilities to private residences, we provide reliable, high-quality services across Bainbridge Island.
services.janitorial_desc: Commercial & Municipal solutions for facilities of all sizes.
services.residential_desc: Top-to-bottom cleaning for homes and offices.
services.moving_desc: Professional labor for your local moves and pickups.
services.sanitizing_desc: Advanced disinfection using backpack sprayers for complete coverage.
services.ready_desc: Island Hands, LLC is equipped to handle the unique demands of municipal and commercial contracts. We prioritize safety, professional equipment, and consistent reliability.
services.safety_desc: Whether we are working in a high-traffic municipal building or a private bathroom, we follow strict safety protocols.

about.title: About Island Hands, LLC
about.subtitle: Your trusted local partner for facility maintenance and residential services on Bainbridge Island.

contact.title: Request a Professional Quote
contact.subtitle: Ready to partner with Island Hands, LLC? Tell us about your project and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
